titleStmt.title: SII 16.270: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 270. (A.R. No. 434 of 1911.) POTTAPI, RAJAMPET TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: At the entrance of the Mūlasthānēśvara temple.

The inscription which is incomplete, records a das11avanda grant of land to Liṅgāreḍḍi and others (names lost), and also to Paṇḍaraṅgi Anantayya and Pāpayya, the karaṇams, by Varadayya Dēvachōḍa-mahārāju, son of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Maṭla Pūcharājayya Dēvachōḍa-mahārāju for their having constructed the Antaragaṅga canal in Pottapi in Pottapi-nāḍu of Sidhavaṭam-sīma in the name of Kōnamaṁgāru, the donor's mother. The donor is said to have obtained Sidhavaṭam-sīma, a subdivision of Udayagiri-durga, as amara-nāyaṅkara from Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāma-rāju Tirumalarājayyadēva-mahārāju.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
paramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīsadāsivadē
vamahārāyaluṁgāru vidyānagara
maṁdu pṛthivisāmrājyaṁ śēyucuṁ
ḍaṁgānu śrīmaṁnmahāmaṁḍalēśva
ra maṭla pūcarājayya dēvacō
ḍa mahārājulayyavāri ko
māruṁḍu varadayya dēvacō
ḍa mahārājuluṁgāru po
ttapi
liṁgāreḍiṁgā�ṁnni
karaṇālu paṁḍaraṁggi Anaṁ
tayya pāpayyaṁgārikinni
Iccina dasavaṁda śilāśāsanakrama
meṭlaṁnanu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśva
ra rāmarāju tirumalarājayya
dēvamahārājula Ayyavāru mā
ku Amaranāyaṁkarānaku pā
liṁcina vudayagiri durgānaku cellivaccē
sidhavaṭaṁ śīmalōni pottapināṁṭi
maṁdunu pottapi grāmamaṁdu
mā talli kōnamaṁmaṁgāri pē
riṭanu Aṁtaragaṁga kāluva tavviṁ
ccinaṁduku kaṭṭaḍasēsina vivaraṁ mā
yaṁna yalamarājuṁgāruṁnnu mē
muṁnu vōraṁpāṭigaḍaprakāraṁ ka
ṭṭaḍasēsi kolapiṁccina gaḍaprakārā
nanu ku 60 Aruvaikuṁṭalakuṁnu Incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 16.270 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
